scope: Recipe resolver cleanup for blockMetalDevice meta 12
changes: Added thaumcraft:mnemonic_matrix as runtime replacement for original ConfigBlocks.blockMetalDevice meta 12.
Moved tc4_mnemonicmatrix arcane recipe output from thaumcraft:tc4_block_mnemonic_matrix to thaumcraft:mnemonic_matrix.
Quarantined old tc4_block_mnemonic_matrix mirror placeholder from creative exposure.
Added Thaumatorium MenuProvider, ThaumatoriumMenu and ThaumatoriumScreen using original gui_thaumatorium.png.
Added selected formula NBT and mnemonic-matrix-gated formula candidate display/selection state.
Added shift-empty-hand formula cycling and empty-hand GUI open while preserving catalyst insert/extract path.
Tightened TC4EssentiaNetworkRuntime to respect sideAllows, one-way traversal, valve/filter gates and tube buffer storage.
explicit_adapters: ThaumatoriumMenu is a Forge 1.19.2 adapter for original ContainerThaumatorium; no modern recipe browser or fake grid was added.
ThaumatoriumScreen displays formula slots/client state but full original clickable packet logic remains for next stage.
Mnemonic Matrix runtime block is an original TC4 block replacement; geometry is still cube_all brainbox adapter until original model render is ported.
not_done_yet: Exact GuiThaumatorium pixel/slot parity and sounds/FX.
Full Mnemonic Matrix renderer with original brainbox/brain2 model behaviour.
gradle: Not run in sandbox: Gradle wrapper still cannot download Gradle 7.5.1 because DNS/network access is unavailable.
